subcodes.first_line: Blessed be He Who bestoweth His grace upon whomsoever He willeth through His command. Say: In this, then, let the believers rejoice. Verily, We have read the books which thou didst send down before, and We are witness unto all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. تبارک الذی یمن علی من یشاء بامره قل فیذلک فلیفرح المومنون و لقد قرئنا کتب الذی نزلتها من قبل و انا لکل شاهدون
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @review of publications, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
